feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: kernel
entry.content: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. The plugin stays general-purpose — project-specific session overlays live in the consuming repo's own hooks, not here.

entry.title: port-daddy
entry.content: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entry.title: vs-token-safer
entry.content: Sits between Claude Code and your codebase and hands back a short file:line list instead of dumping source into the chat. It uses a real language server when it can (clangd / Roslyn / tsserver / pyright), tree-sitter when there's no toolchain, and a fuzzy search built from your repo's own naming when you don't know the exact name (no embeddings). It section-edits Markdown and config files the same way. Everything stays on your machine. No IDE required. Bundles gamedev-log-analyzer for reading huge editor/build logs.

entry.title: iowarp-contributing
entry.content: Uniform contributing guidelines for the IOWarp/Clio ecosystem — git etiquette, code style, project architecture, and workflow standards.

entry.title: dobby
entry.content: Architect-and-workers engineering kit: staged work sessions (scope → interview → research → spec → execute → wrap), worker agents (researcher, implementor, reviewer, verifier), and supporting skills.

entry.title: mind
entry.content: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entry.title: research-engine
entry.content: Deep research engine for URLs (YouTube, arXiv, GitHub, blogs) or topic keywords. Produces structured markdown reports with full source attribution via parallel subagent fanout.

entry.title: monk
entry.content: Deploy and operate full applications with Monk DevOps Agent — cloud infra, SaaS integrations, and containerized workloads — from one chat. Bundles the monk skill and blocks accidental `monk` CLI shell-outs that would desync cluster state.

entry.title: skills-registry
entry.content: Site generation skills for the OpenDataHub Skills Registry

entry.title: engineering-discipline
entry.content: Engineering discipline skills: optimization rules, systematic debugging, AI slop cleanup, and implementation guardrails

entry.title: stacked-prs
entry.content: Manage stacked branches and pull requests with git config metadata, Deno helper scripts, and the gh CLI.

entry.title: worldos
entry.content: WorldOS — simulate living, AI-generated worlds and play epic D&D 5e inside them. An AI DM generates stories live within persistent, canon-anchored worlds; deterministic 5e rules, searchable memory, a voiced AI companion, fully voice-acted.

entry.title: moonshot-relay-claude-profile
entry.content: moonshot-relay-claude-profile — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: stageset
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entry.title: design-system
entry.content: World-class DS governance — skills + hooks + rules + CLAUDE.md instructions + 31 active M-rules + 89 audit dims. Source-of-truth for product workspaces consuming @qijenchen/design-system npm package.

entry.title: sf-demo-scout
entry.content: Salesforce demo preparation pipeline — sparring, audit, deployment for SE demo orgs

entry.title: babysitter
entry.content: Orchestrate complex, multi-step workflows with event-sourced state management, hook-based extensibility, and human-in-the-loop approval

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: flatppl
entry.content: Skills that teach AI agents to write FlatPPL models and answer questions about the language, grounding every construct in the public FlatPPL design spec.

entry.title: claude-kit
entry.content: Multi-agent /workflow development pipeline (planner → plan-review → coder → code-review) with typed handoff contracts, lifecycle hooks, and MCP servers.

entry.title: envoic
entry.content: Scan, audit, and safely clean Python virtual environments, node_modules, and development artifacts.

entry.title: github-release
entry.content: Safe, automated GitHub releases with supply chain security. Prevents dangerous gh release commands, orchestrates version bumps, signed tags, and CI-driven releases across ecosystems (TYPO3, PHP, Node.js, Go, Python, Rust, skill repos).

entry.title: w
entry.content: Universal slash commands `/w:*` (w = workflow) for the `@tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli` runtime. Stages + loops + artifacts model: SPEC (spec-new · spec-refine), PLAN (plan-new · plan-exec), QUICK (quick), workspace-init bootstrap, and the export-* family (the only artifact→docs/ promotion path). Commands start AI-run loops that manage sessions/artifacts under `.workflow/sessions/`; pluggable capability skills bind via `.workflow/skills.toml`. Install: `/plugin marketplace add ...` + `/plugin install w@<marketplace>`. peerDependency: `@tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli`.

entry.title: agentops
entry.content: The operational layer for coding agents. Bookkeeping, validation, and flows that compound knowledge between sessions.

entry.title: nlpm
entry.content: Natural-Language Programming Manager — score, check, fix, and test NL artifacts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Antigravity. Tier-aware scoring with per-tool overlays.

entry.title: phased-development
entry.content: Multi-tier orchestration system for long-running software projects: phase/sprint roles, testing protocol, Codex delegation, Sprint 0 trial pattern. Use when starting a new project expected to run 3+ phases.

entry.title: telegram-notify
entry.content: Telegram-bridged notifications and human-in-the-loop for Claude Code: approval gate (binary + picker) and work-completion notifier.

entry.title: debate
entry.content: Multi-model AI plan review: run any acpx-supported agent (Codex, Antigravity, Kimi, Qwen, etc.) in parallel, synthesize feedback, debate contradictions

entry.title: formae-mcp
entry.content: MCP server and skills for formae infrastructure-as-code: manage cloud resources, handle drift, discover infrastructure, and build plugins

entry.title: writing
entry.content: アイディアの発散から原稿の完成まで、執筆ワークフロー全体を支援するアウトライン駆動執筆プラグイン。

entry.title: cnspec-skills
entry.content: cnspec agent skills for MQL development and policy navigation

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: 20-category solo-SaaS-founder platform — autonomous engineering OS, 18+ agents, 117 doctrine rules, 20+ slash commands, production forge script, LLM eval harness, MCP registry, DO agent scaffolding, RAG pipeline, multi-tenant subdomain provisioning, full-document processing (DOCX/XLSX/PDF/PPTX), and 32 AI-tool platform variants. One-line prompts to deployed Cloudflare Workers products.

entry.title: talos
entry.content: Orquestra pipelines de desenvolvimento de features no Talos (PRD, validação, entrevista, plano, execução, repair, review), auditoria universal e geração explícita de backlog mestre. Bundle único: 10 skills talos-* + orquestrador + 5 templates canônicos + validator subagente. Pipeline orientado a artefato com gates G1–G11.

entry.title: jstack
entry.content: jstack — a layered learn→plan→execute loop over 9 phases. Step 0 plans the task into a dependency-ordered checklist + a # LAYERS list; each layer walks all nine phases then advances to the next (frontend→…→deploy), only the last firing the ship promise. A semantic node-cache keys each node by a normalized token-set signature of its goal, so when a goal matches one settled on a prior walk the loop surfaces the prior result for reuse (skip) and fans out independent nodes in parallel. Mandatory podman containment: ship gates and witnesses run inside a memory-capped envelope (no host fallback). Contract-native: /contract substrate (aiko), default ship_gate, post-ship seal. In-place, multi-session, per-step grader, fib-harness adversarial pass on the verdict phase. Three harness adapters: Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode.

entry.title: hotwire-codex-skills
entry.content: Unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (by Ayush Newatia), published with the author's permission. Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.

entry.title: ios-simulator-ui-flow
entry.content: Autonomous iOS Simulator UI verification flow verified against AXe v1.7.0: build, install, launch, inspect, tap, slider, swipe, drag, batch, screenshot, video, and verify.

entry.title: code-craftsmanship
entry.content: Code quality and software design skills including Clean Code (Robert C. Martin), Refactoring patterns (Martin Fowler), A Philosophy of Software Design (John Ousterhout), The Pragmatic Programmer (Hunt & Thomas), Domain-Driven Design (Eric Evans), and Working Effectively with Legacy Code (Michael Feathers)

entry.title: dsg-governance
entry.content: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: gravity-town
entry.content: Play Gravity Town — a fully on-chain AI-agent world on Gravity L1 (chain 127001). Create an agent, claim and harvest hex territory, build mines/arsenals, raid rivals, message and ally with other agents, write on-chain memories, and battle in the Arena autobattler. Includes a zero-clone MCP server (npx) so any MCP-capable agent can play.

entry.title: cais-harness
entry.content: Custom AI Studio agentic coding harness. Full client project lifecycle from intake to deployed POC/MVP via a connected 8-phase artifact pipeline.

entry.title: sigma
entry.content: Personal AI workflow toolkit for data science & AI engineering. Research-first, spec-driven, loop-engineered pipeline (research → propose → blueprint → spec → tasks → implement-task → verify → loop), plus the Hermes conductor, a kanban board, and HTML artifact export.

entry.title: google-ads-ppc-waste-finder
entry.content: Find wasted Google Ads spend fast: pulls the last 7 days of search terms via the Optmyzr MCP, flags high-spend zero-conversion queries, separates true waste from brand/competitor traffic, estimates monthly savings, and returns a ranked table plus a ready-to-paste negative keyword list. Powered by Optmyzr.

entry.title: ppt-generator
entry.content: Auto-generate presentations in Claude Code. The MCP server owns prompts, output schemas, and deterministic post-processing (validation, layout, lint, HTML/PPTX render); the client generates the slide content via a prepare/ingest handshake — no server-side LLM.

entry.title: expedait-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills for managing project specifications with Expedait — download objectives, deliverables and context, author and edit deliverables, design project-type processes, post inline comments, and review code against requirements.

entry.title: sediment
entry.content: Memory that forgets. A self-curating agent memory: writes only what it can't re-derive from the code, and deletes what went stale — only when a session changes something memory-relevant. No vault, no database, no setup.

entry.title: faa-aircraft-registry-mcp-server
entry.content: Decode N-numbers to aircraft, engine, status, and owner, and search the US civil aircraft registry by owner, type, or state — offline, keyless.

entry.title: claude-code-toolkit
entry.content: Complete developer toolkit for Claude Code

entry.title: heins-multi-agent
entry.content: Offload a heavy prompt/task to a background sub-agent while you keep chatting. Check status with /heins-multi-agent:status, continue a task with /heins-multi-agent:followup, get a desktop notification, and auto-announce the result when the sub-agent finishes.

entry.title: travel-agent
entry.content: Guided travel agent: research a destination, compare and choose a stay, generate a centered food/nightlife/things-to-do guide, build a book-ahead checklist, and optionally publish a shareable trip website. Writes everything to Notion.

entry.title: awesome-discord-channel
entry.content: Awesome Discord channel for Claude Code with access control and a hardened visible-reply delivery contract.

entry.title: bionic-castor
entry.content: Skills to make my life better

entry.title: figma-handoff
entry.content: Deep, verified Figma-to-dev handoff prep: scored audit, business-semantic naming, real auto-layout, componentization, tokens, a11y annotations — copy-first with visual-diff safety.

entry.title: factiq
entry.content: Answer economic and financial data questions with real data from FactIQ — publish shareable charts and reports, render terminal previews, or build bespoke local HTML visualizations.

entry.title: QT-claude-kit
entry.content: Quentin's personal Claude Code kit: specialized agents (and later skills, commands, hooks, scripts) for dev workflows.

entry.title: deskill-de
entry.content: Data Engineering Project Roadmap: lifecycle commands, implementation patterns, AI agent personas, and YAML templates for building production data pipelines

entry.title: gssr-toolbelt
entry.content: Coleccion de skills reutilizables para asistentes de codigo.

entry.title: loop-goal
entry.content: Discipline rules for long-running agent tasks — recurring loops and run-until-done goals. Checkpoint to .loopgoal/state.json, isolate each iteration in a fresh subagent, and write an explicit exit condition.

entry.title: macaron
entry.content: Macaron WebUI for Claude Code — streaming GenUI builder, model switcher (Claude / Codex / Macaron), and visual session manager.

entry.title: fi-logistics
entry.content: Generates RAJCO Industries EFS customs invoices (xlsx + pdf) from Custimoo packing lists, following the shirts/shorts/jackets pricing, sizing, and re-export balance rules.

entry.title: claude-code-dashboard
entry.content: Local web dashboard for Claude Code — monitor rate limits, manage agents/skills/hooks/MCP servers, browse session history, track daily activity and usage rankings

entry.title: claude-imagegen
entry.content: Image generation plugin prototype for Claude Code using a CPU-first renderer with optional local GPU diffusion.

entry.title: flow-workflow
entry.content: Flow workflow skill and callable tools for chat-visible Build/Plan/Goal and Logic workflows.

entry.title: taste-check
entry.content: A Rick Rubin-inspired taste check for code, UI, copy, product scope, names, and launch ideas.

entry.title: promptify
entry.content: Drafts polished prompts and Claude Code /goal conditions, tuned to whichever Claude or OpenAI model family is detected.

entry.title: debaid
entry.content: Debian/Ubuntu packaging assistant: bootstrap, refresh, lintian-clean, and add autopkgtest coverage — house-style prescriptive, maintainer-in-the-loop.

entry.title: vision-specialist
entry.content: Image and visual analysis with screenshot interpretation and text extraction

entry.title: explore
entry.content: Smart codebase exploration with dependency mapping and structure analysis

entry.title: linear-helper
entry.content: Linear issue tracking integration and workflow management

entry.title: workflow-optimizer
entry.content: Development workflow analysis and optimization recommendations

entry.title: load-tester
entry.content: Load and stress testing for APIs and web services

entry.title: python-expert
entry.content: Python-specific development with type hints and idiomatic refactoring

entry.title: gcp-helper
entry.content: Google Cloud Platform service configuration and deployment

entry.title: seed-generator
entry.content: Database seeding script generation with realistic data

entry.title: slack-notifier
entry.content: Slack integration for deployment and build notifications

entry.title: frontend-developer
entry.content: Frontend component development with accessibility and responsive design

entry.title: migration-generator
entry.content: Database migration generation and rollback management

entry.title: regex-builder
entry.content: Build, test, and debug regular expression patterns

entry.title: experiment-tracker
entry.content: ML experiment tracking with metrics logging and run comparison

entry.title: update-branch
entry.content: Rebase and update feature branches with conflict resolution

entry.title: ultrathink
entry.content: Deep analysis mode with extended reasoning for complex problems

entry.title: migrate-tool
entry.content: Generate database migrations and code migration scripts for framework upgrades

entry.title: product-shipper
entry.content: Ship features end-to-end with launch checklists and rollout plans

entry.title: monorepo-manager
entry.content: Manage monorepo packages with affected detection and version synchronization

entry.title: visual-regression
entry.content: Visual regression testing with screenshot comparison

entry.title: tool-evaluator
entry.content: Evaluate and compare developer tools with structured scoring criteria

entry.title: superpowers-zh
entry.content: Superpowers 技能集中文版：TDD、调试、协作模式与经过验证的技巧

entry.title: mllog
entry.content: Automatic experiment logging for ML coding sessions. Captures per-run facts (metrics, git state, transcript) on session start/stop, and provides /mllog and /logbook commands.

entry.title: devlog
entry.content: Automatic dev tracking for Claude Code via hooks and tags — a local dashboard for builds, plans, releases, security findings, and standards, with zero telemetry.

entry.title: spec-to-pr
entry.content: An agentic development toolkit: an autonomous spec-to-PR loop plus supporting skills and agents for spec validation, code review, and documentation.

entry.title: jira-cloud-tools
entry.content: Tools for working with Jira Cloud (REST API v3 / ADF). Includes analyze-jira-ticket: fetch a single ticket plus its context and produce a type-aware analysis.

entry.title: claude-arcade
entry.content: Retro terminal games to play while waiting for long-running processes in Claude Code. Kill time with Tic-Tac-Toe, Minesweeper, Hangman, Wordle, 2048, and Chess.

entry.title: corply
entry.content: Corply — your startup's AI general counsel. Incorporate a Delaware C-corp end-to-end from Claude Code: guided application, document generation, conversational e-signature, and filing handoff.

entry.title: opsx-feature-dev
entry.content: Feature development workflow that combines deep codebase exploration, architecture design, and implementation with OpenSpec artifact-driven documentation

entry.title: dependabot-reviewer
entry.content: Review all open Dependabot PRs requiring your review on github.com and github.tools.sap. Approves safe updates, sets automerge, updates branches, and flags PRs that require manual action.

entry.title: hello-world
entry.content: Example plugin demonstrating marketplace registration

entry.title: acrosstudio-skills
entry.content: Acrosstudio proposals, strategy frameworks, and engagement orchestration

entry.title: fabric-capacity
entry.content: Talk to your Microsoft Fabric capacities from a Power BI Pro license: read CU usage (Capacity Metrics + Chargeback), diagnose capacity health, throttling, overload, blocked workspaces and affected users, and join CU cost with engagement for ROI. All read-only DAX over the Execute Queries REST API. Add-on to microsoft/skills-for-fabric.

entry.title: accounting-skills
entry.content: Processes client financial documents into accrual-basis financial statements, working papers, and tax computations compliant with MPERS, MFRS, and ITA 1967. Supports Sole Prop, Partnership, Sdn Bhd, Berhad, and NGO.

entry.title: coding
entry.content: Progressive Guardrails output style: educational insights, terminology corrections, and enforceable repo/agent guardrails surfaced from coding friction and user feedback.

entry.title: porygon
entry.content: AI-augmented pokeemerald ROM hacking: binary map I/O, build/debug loop, event scripting, and map wiring. Augments Porymap and the decomp workflow; not autonomous.

entry.title: essentials
entry.content: Core writing and workflow skills for Claude.

entry.title: project
entry.content: Manage multi-repo "projects" — a named effort with one git worktree per repo, all sharing a branch.

entry.title: claude-sdlc-kit
entry.content: From BRD to tested app: run one operator + a fleet of Claude agents as a disciplined SDLC team. Bundles corpus->knowledge-base ingestion, the development-contract method, the orchestrator protocol, gated integration, and heavy parallel QA.

entry.title: gemini
entry.content: Use Gemini from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

entry.title: astrobot
entry.content: Gives each Claude model a permanent astrological identity that subtly tints its tone day by day.

entry.title: agy
entry.content: Use the Antigravity (agy) CLI from Claude Code: /agy:setup, /agy:prompt, /agy:status.

entry.title: rock-techkit
entry.content: Rock RMS development patterns and tools for Claude.

entry.title: gitbook
entry.content: Comprehensive skill for GitBook documentation — create, manage, and author GitBook sites end-to-end via the GitBook REST API and Git Sync.

entry.title: agentx-kit
entry.content: Scaffold complete provider-agnostic LangChain/CrewAI agent projects from a single problem statement, via AgentX-Kit's MCP tools.

entry.title: acm-context-management
entry.content: Context-management techniques (tool-result trimming, summarisation, image-recall, memory) for Claude Code via hooks + an MCP server. Pairs with acm-gateway for full-parity context editing.

entry.title: my-claude-skills
entry.content: A custom plugin containing all 170 imported skills

entry.title: sdlc-toolkit
entry.content: Multi-agent SDLC ecosystem: 21 specialist subagents (architects, engineers, professors/reviewers) and 20 orchestrator/workflow commands (architecture-team, engineering-team, product-team, ux-team, saas-team, professor reviews, ADR/runbook authoring, bug diagnosis).

entry.title: hlive
entry.content: Expert guidance and scaffolding for HLive, the server-side virtual-DOM framework for Go. Skills cover the core API, the hhtml markup builders, project structure, the hlivekit toolkit, and browser testing; /hlive-component scaffolds a component or page, and /hlive-new-project scaffolds a whole runnable project.

entry.title: todomaker
entry.content: Manage TodoMaker project todos from Claude Code: check pending tasks for the current repo, add tasks and projects. Bundles the TodoMaker MCP server (auto-registered on install) and a usage skill.

entry.title: orbit
entry.content: Reusable skills for AI agents: repository understanding, review, delivery, release/ops, security, and tool integrations.

entry.title: claude-skills-test
entry.content: A custom plugin containing imported skills

entry.title: codebrief-capture
entry.content: Codebrief intent capture — distills developer intent locally at session end and sends only derived annotations (never code) to your Codebrief workspace.

entry.title: seyfert
entry.content: Source-verified Seyfert v5 guidance for building Discord bots with Claude Code & Codex

entry.title: claude-learn
entry.content: Socratic tutoring plugin: detects your stack, profiles your level, and turns every coding session into guided learning — hints not answers, gated progress, no code written for you.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: Skills for the Amigo forge CLI

entry.title: wiki
entry.content: Indexed knowledge bases with command-line tools for agents.

entry.title: demo-director
entry.content: Turn Claude into a SaaS marketing demo video creator: explore an app, extract its brand, script, narrate with local TTS, capture real footage, render with Remotion.

entry.title: timbre
entry.content: Draft on-brand LinkedIn/X posts in your voice. Two options, real receipts, you pick — it never auto-posts and learns from every choice.

entry.title: gw
entry.content: Agent skill that teaches AI agents to drive the gw git-worktree CLI.

entry.title: ses
entry.content: SAP Enterprise Agent Stack — 11 agentes especializados (ABAP, CAP/BTP, Fiori, HANA, Integration, Basis, Migration, QA, DevOps, Requirements, Docs), gates de Definition of Done, y MCP servers SAP. Orquestador SAP como skill.

entry.title: ritus
entry.content: AI-assisted development workflow — triage, task generation, execution, verification, and adversarial code review

entry.title: kaggle-tabular
entry.content: Grandmaster-grade, validation-first workflow for solo tabular Kaggle competitions: leakage hard-rules, a gated 8-phase loop, an OOF artifact contract, a scaffolder + rule-encoding template, and multi-agent orchestration. Cross-harness (Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode).

entry.title: autoloop
entry.content: Run and operate autoloops — start runs, monitor progress, inject guidance, manage worktrees, inspect artifacts, and clean up.

entry.title: sdpm
entry.content: Spec-driven PowerPoint generation with a compose sub-agent (Claude Code).

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: skills-md
entry.content: Skills Repository for Claude Code

entry.title: swe
entry.content: State-machine workflow engine with Serena memory persistence, hook-driven event architecture, and optional swarm orchestration

entry.title: cursor-bridge
entry.content: MCP server: 从 Claude Code 直驱 Cursor IDE 的 agent 做语义代码检索（CDP 直驱，无 console 注入）。

entry.title: eth2-quickstart
entry.content: Repo-backed Ethereum node operations for Claude Code via the canonical eth2qs wrapper and MCP server.

entry.title: magician
entry.content: Full-stack SDLC plugin with dynamic project inspection, a local code knowledge-graph + cache, cross-session reference memory, self-learning, and parallel agent orchestration

entry.title: twinharness
entry.content: Agentic SDLC Orchestrator: drive a vague idea through tier-scaled SDLC stages, producing governing artifacts and slice-by-slice builds. Hybrid design — prompt orchestration (17 specialized agents) plus a deterministic `th` CLI for mechanical enforcement (state, hashing, anchors, traceability, coverage, drift, cascade-staleness).

entry.title: agent-critter
entry.content: 一只桌宠小精灵，实时展示 Claude Code 的工作状态。支持 Petdex 社区 2700+ 精灵，透明窗口、可拖拽、可缩放。

entry.title: google-go-style
entry.content: Skill that codifies the Google Go Style Guide into actionable rules for writing, reviewing, and refactoring Go code.

entry.title: claude-code-status-bar
entry.content: Warns you before a rate limit or auto-compact, not after. A pure-bash Claude Code status bar (no jq, Node optional) for macOS, Linux, and Windows: usage pacing + burn-rate forecast, context warnings, live activity, cost, git, and 8 themes.

entry.title: meaningfy-architecture
entry.content: The design / modelling role: system architecture (C4, ArchiMate/UML, ADRs, contracts) and the living conceptual model (LinkML → typed artefacts)

entry.title: sessionscribe
entry.content: Automatically generates a clean, human-readable summary of every Claude Code session — what was asked, what files changed, and what commands ran.

entry.title: glyphdown
entry.content: Two-register prompting convention for Claude Code: dense ASCII form for internal reasoning, normal prose for user-visible output. Default deterministic codec + opt-in own-trained ML sidecar (no API key, no vendor). Ships a skill, UserPromptSubmit + PreCompact + PostToolUse hooks, lossless tool-result codec (ANSI strip + JSON minify + blank-collapse + trailing marker + data-shape guard + schema-tag prefix + break-even guard), and a 4-arm token benchmark. Fail-open on every path. Run bench/bench.py for measured numbers.

entry.title: changes-consistency
entry.content: Validates that staged git changes match your stated intent - reports missing or extra changes in a standardized table format

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: autopunk-media-skills
entry.content: 394 Claude skills for TV producers, journalists, podcasters, YouTubers and media professionals

entry.title: nerdflair
entry.content: Nerd Font-powered statusline with configurable layout, color themes, progress bar flair, and audio chime notifications for Claude Code. Shows context usage, model, git branch, cost, and MCP servers.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: specify
entry.content: SDD + TDD + Agentic SDLC framework. Manages specs, memory, and gates per project.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: claude-speak
entry.content: Hear Claude Code. Speaks a short summary of each reply in a natural system voice — or, on macOS, your own Personal Voice. Optional floating desktop avatar (Claudette) that lip-syncs to the speech. Toggle and configure with /claude-speak (on/off/setup/voice/personal-voice/avatar). Idle alerts are off by default. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

entry.title: latex-lsp
entry.content: LaTeX/BibTeX language server for code intelligence

entry.title: new-and-noteworthy
entry.content: Generates "New and Noteworthy" summaries for project updates. Use when you need to summarize recent changes, update NEW_AND_NOTEWORTHY.md, or explain what has changed between two git references (branches, tags, or commits).

entry.title: chuzom
entry.content: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: ai-skills
entry.content: Benjamin's collection of Claude Code skills — daily workflow, code quality, dev tools, and specialist agents.

entry.title: the-point
entry.content: Agentic design system for Claude Code. Blueprint interviews and builds complete HTML + CSS pages. Artisan makes targeted design changes on existing builds. Forge maintains the component system. Copy writes brand-voice content. Review runs the automated quality loop with self-healing. Scout researches domain visual conventions.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: home-assistant-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for Home Assistant: best practices for automations, helpers, templates, device control, and dashboards.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: claude-skills-templates
entry.content: Work lifecycle pipeline, doc contract enforcement, and skill authoring workbench for Claude Code

entry.title: artifice-discord
entry.content: A stripped-down and enhanced fork of Claude Code's official Discord plugin. Adds live tool-usage streaming, voice mode (Whisper STT + TTS), and customizable hooks. Access via /artifice-discord:access.

entry.title: finplan
entry.content: Personal finance projection engine — Monte Carlo projections, tax calculations, retirement planning, Social Security analysis, and interactive dashboards. Powered by 60+ MCP tools.

entry.title: flywheel
entry.content: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), and factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor).

entry.title: claude-code-memory
entry.content: Claude Codeの記憶を外部DBに保存し、セッション間で知識・決定事項・アクティビティを永続化する

entry.title: agent-bridge
entry.content: Persistent session bridge from Claude Code to local OMP, Codex, and Claude Code agents over MCP. Open a delegated-agent session, stream its output, and have a second coding agent review or implement.

entry.title: memory-map
entry.content: Visualiza as memórias do Claude Code (CLAUDE.md global, CLAUDE.md do projeto e MEMORY.md) como um mapa mental interativo servido em localhost.

entry.title: design-ai
entry.content: Senior product designer for any AI coding agent. 20 skills, 17 commands, 4 review agents covering UI/UX, website improvement, design systems, motion, illustration, print, video, game UI, conversational, and spatial design. Korean market depth.

entry.title: bifrost-plugin
entry.content: Bifrost MCP gateway plugin for Claude Code: memory auto-injection, skill discovery, one-command onboarding.

entry.title: app-store-connect
entry.content: App Store Connect tools for Claude — apps, TestFlight, customer reviews, sales/finance reports, and team users via MCP

entry.title: ctoc
entry.content: Your Virtual CTO — 60 AI agents. 265 expert skills. 15 quality gates.

entry.title: recoup-skills
entry.content: A record label in a box. Recoup turns your AI agent into a full music team — artist research and analytics, content and short-form video, song analysis, release campaigns, and catalog valuation — all in one install.

entry.title: spotify-ads-api
entry.content: Manage Spotify ad campaigns with natural language. Create campaigns, ad sets, ads, pull reports, and handle OAuth — all through conversation.

entry.title: comply
entry.content: Gemara compliance pipeline and policy generation via MCP server

entry.title: folio
entry.content: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. minimal scope = ADR-0003/0007: 1 skill + 6 hook + 7 script + 1 CLI.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: hermes-tweet
entry.content: Native Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin for Xquik automation with read-first workflows and approval-gated actions.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: kerby
entry.content: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

entry.title: fabric-dw
entry.content: Agent skills for Fabric Data Warehouse: query performance analysis, warehouse-wide performance investigation and tuning, and dbt project bootstrap.

entry.title: spanner-readonly-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Google Cloud Spanner MCP server. Exposes SELECT-only query execution and schema introspection (list_tables, describe_table, list_indexes, execute_query). Write operations are blocked by both a forbidden-keyword regex and a Spanner read-only snapshot.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: respira-wordpress-skills
entry.content: 35 specialised WordPress skills covering page-builder migrations (12 paths including Divi to Gutenberg, Elementor to Bricks, WPBakery to Gutenberg), site audits (technical debt, mobile experience, WooCommerce health), content workflows (internal linking, content portability, SEO/AEO), and onboarding. Auto-activates relevant skills as you describe what you want to do. Companion to Respira for WordPress Claude Co-work plugin.

entry.title: token-economy
entry.content: Cut INPUT/orchestration tokens for multi-agent work, plus output discipline for the main thread. Mechanisms: discover-once context-pack (single repo scan, file:line map), terse read-only analysis lenses (no Edit/Write enforces read-only), a frugal output-style (result-first, no narration), a pluggable memory adapter (search-before/write-after, no races), and cap+cache. Complements caveman (output-style compression) — they stack.

entry.title: qtim
entry.content: Bootstrap и оркестрация постоянной команды специализированных субагентов под любой проект. Включает генератор setup с автоподбором skills и плагинов/MCP под стек, движок team-up/team-lazy/team-down на актуальном рантайме Agent Teams (Agent/SendMessage/Task*), intake-протокол, каталог паттернов оркестрации, протокол Codex second-opinion и hooks-гейты качества.

entry.title: harmonia-ready-commands
entry.content: Harmonia Ready Commands — a provider-agnostic reasoning toolkit. 15 logic/analysis commands (brzytwa, dekompozycja, kontra, waliduj, zrodla, ...) that turn any AI coding assistant into a disciplined reasoning engine: cite-or-nothing, cardinal vs non-cardinal contradictions, source-of-truth vs source-of-knowledge.

entry.title: agentic-sage
entry.content: Passive fleet judge for parallel Claude Code sessions — sage-fleet coordination skill + sage-doctor install validator.

entry.title: splunk-expert
entry.content: Expert-level Splunk Enterprise skills covering SPL, conf file management (props, transforms, server, indexes, inputs), SC4S, CIM compliance, TA/app development, ITSI, SOAR, distributed architecture, deployment server, dashboards, ingestion pipeline design, the Splunk UI Toolkit, log triage, Linux host tuning, HEC, Windows host, alert actions, REST API, authentication, KV Store, MLTK, and workload management.

entry.title: website-deploy
entry.content: Deploy static websites to simple-host.app (inline JSON files or tar.gz/zip), plus a guide for what to build with the per-site backend: shared JSON state with atomic ops, append-only collections, private password-locked pages, drop-in comments/feedback widgets, and starter templates.

entry.title: self-learning
entry.content: Capture a hard-won golden path from the current session as a reusable Agent Skill, so future sessions start already knowing it.

entry.title: quota
entry.content: Read remaining Claude usage quota (5h / 7d / per-model weekly) from the free account-metadata endpoint, with a clearly-announced billed fallback.

entry.title: polygraph
entry.content: Grade and verify MCP servers A–F with the open polygraph litmus — tool-output injection, egress, sensitive-data, and adversarial-input checks. Bundles the polygraph skill, the polygraph-litmus MCP server, and /polygraph:grade · /polygraph:check.

entry.title: devops-coco-agents
entry.content: Scaffold and run the CoCo scan->issue->fix agent loop on GitHub Actions or GitLab CI. Provisions Snowflake OIDC resources, sets secrets/variables, and triggers the automation end-to-end.

entry.title: premium-ui-os
entry.content: Premium app design system, motion, 3D, visual QA, and ship-readiness workflows for Claude Code.

entry.title: bc-gov-design-system
entry.content: BC Government Design System plugin providing official design tokens, component patterns, and usage rules for building WCAG 2.1 AA compliant BC Government digital services.

entry.title: last30flames
entry.content: Research what is actually new about any topic in a recent time window. Full-content web results via Firecrawl, plus honest engagement signals from Hacker News and GitHub. No LLM key needed - the agent harness synthesizes the brief.

entry.title: generative-cinema
entry.content: A cinematic context system for generative image/video: define a project's visual language, plan coverage, write model-optimized shot prompts, and keep the model library current — backed by film-grammar and craft references and a review crew (script supervisor, director, researcher).
